things.name: St Thomas Church (Thomaskirche)
things.description: Gothic church where Bach worked for 27 years — the Bach Archive and Museum are next door

things.name: Leipzig Zoo
things.description: One of Europe's oldest and most acclaimed zoos with the spectacular Gondwanaland tropical hall

things.name: Monument to the Battle of the Nations
things.description: Colossal 91-metre monument commemorating Napoleon's 1813 defeat — one of Europe's largest

things.name: Augustusplatz
things.description: Leipzig's main square flanked by the Opera House, Gewandhaus concert hall and university tower

things.name: Mädler Passage
things.description: Stunning Art Nouveau shopping arcade with Auerbachs Keller restaurant where Goethe set Faust

things.name: Museum of Fine Arts Leipzig
things.description: One of Germany's most important art museums with German Romantic and Old Masters collections

things.name: Spinnerei Cotton Mill Arts Complex
things.description: Former cotton mill transformed into Europe's largest artist studios complex with galleries and cafes

things.name: Clara-Zetkin-Park
things.description: Vast riverside park popular for walking, cycling and weekend festivals

things.name: Volkerschlachtdenkmal Museum
things.description: Forum of Contemporary History museum in the GDR-era building beside the giant memorial

things.name: Karl-Liebknecht-Strasse (Karli)
things.description: Leipzig's trendiest street packed with independent cafes, vintage shops and weekend markets
